title: Enemy Lines duology
content:
{{Top|rwm|njo|title=''Enemy Lines'' duology}} {{BookSeries |image=[[File:NJOEnemyLines-SFBC.jpg]] |title=''Enemy Lines'' duology |author=[[Aaron Allston]] |cover artist=[[Dave Seeley]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=*[[Del Rey]] (paperbacks) *[[Science Fiction Book Club]] (hardcover) |first date=[[March 26]], [[2002]]{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/2513/rebel-dream-star-wars-legends-by-aaron-allston|text=Rebel Dream: Star Wars Legends}} |last date=[[May 28]], [[2002]]{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/2515/rebel-stand-star-wars-legends-the-new-jedi-order-by-aaron-allston|text=Rebel Stand: Star Wars Legends (The New Jedi Order)}} |media type=Novels |timeline=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |num books=2 |preceded by=''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' |followed by=''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' }} The '''''Enemy Lines'' duology''' was written by [[Aaron Allston]] and was a part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] and included the novels ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream|Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' and ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand|Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''. Both novels were included in a hardcover omnibus by the [[Science Fiction Book Club]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Rebel Dream: Scattering after the Yuuzhan Vong's invasion of Coruscant, the panic-stricken members of the New Republic Advisory Council pause just long enough to set up a mock defense on nearby Borleias—an attempt to buy time that fools no one, least of all the Jedi''. ''Leia and Han Solo travel from world to world to foment rebellion against the New Republic's disastrous appeasement policies. But Luke Skywalker has chosen the most dangerous assignment of all: to sneak into the Yuuzhan Vong's stronghold on Coruscant. His outrageous scheme to gain entry is either brilliant or suicidal, depending on the outcome. Bearing down swiftly on Borleias is a Yuuzhan Vong invasion fleet, determined to destroy the galaxy's remaining defenders…'' ''Rebel Stand: Luke Skywalker's daring mission to halt the Yuuzhan Vong's nefarious plot to overthrow the New Republic is struggling on all fronts. And time is slipping away for Han and Leia Organa Solo, trapped on a small planet whose rulers are about to yield to Yuuzhan Vong pressure to give up the Jedi rebels.'' ''On Coruscant, Luke and Mara Jade Skywalker have made a shocking discovery that is preventing the Yuuzhan Vong from exerting complete control. But when the enemy tracks them down, Luke and Mara are thrust into a fierce battle for their lives. Suddenly, the chances of escaping appear nearly impossible. And in space, another battle rages, one that holds ominous consequences for the New Republic—and for the Jedi themselves.'' ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:NJOEnemyLines-SFBC.jpg|Cover File:Rebel_Dream_Cover.jpg|Cover of [[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream|''Rebel Dream'']] File:Rebel_Stand_Cover.jpg|Cover of [[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand|''Rebel Stand'']] ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/news20010904.html|text=Preview: Dark Journey / Rebel Dream}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Duology-box |title=[[Enemy Lines duology|''Enemy Lines'' duology]] |part1=[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream|Rebel Dream]]''
